Graphics tests for circles, GPath masking, rotated bitmaps, single lines, text rendering, and clipping.


## Files
- **[gfx_test_circles.c](gfx_test_circles.c.md)**: Graphics tests for drawing circles and radial shapes with various configurations.
- **[gfx_test_gpath_masking.c](gfx_test_gpath_masking.c.md)**: A graphics test for GPath masking, drawing circles and a triangle mask on a layer.
- **[gfx_test_list.h](gfx_test_list.h.md)**: Defines a list of graphics tests for various rendering scenarios in the Pebble firmware.
- **[gfx_test_rotated_bitmap.c](gfx_test_rotated_bitmap.c.md)**: Tests for drawing and rotating bitmaps with different compositing modes and angles.
- **[gfx_test_single_line.c](gfx_test_single_line.c.md)**: Defines a graphics test that draws a single random line on a layer with a random color.
- **[gfx_test_text.c](gfx_test_text.c.md)**: Tests text rendering in a graphical context using a random color and a system font.
- **[gfx_test_text_clipping.c](gfx_test_text_clipping.c.md)**: Tests text clipping functionality in a graphical context with setup and teardown procedures.
- **[gfx_tests.c](gfx_tests.c.md)**: Implements a framework for running and displaying results of graphics tests on a Pebble device.
- **[gfx_tests.h](gfx_tests.h.md)**: Header file for graphics/UI test setup, teardown, and execution in the Pebble firmware.
